descriptionHtml:
Bavaria 41C for sale 2014 | 3 Cabins Version | Tax Paid

 

The Bavaria 41C for sale 2014 is a well-regarded cruising yacht offering comfort, practicality, and reliable sailing performance (Autopilot, AIS, VHF, EPIRB, Bilge Pumps, Solar Panels, Inverter, Code 0...). Currently available in good condition, she combines quality German engineering with thoughtful upgrades, making her a sensible option for anyone seeking a safe and enjoyable sailing experience. With a spacious interior and well-equipped deck, this Bavaria 41C is set up for both coastal cruising and longer passages.

Specifications – Bavaria 41C for sale 2014

  • Length: 11.99 m
  • Beam: 3.95 m
  • Draft: 2.10 m

Deck & Cockpit Equipment:

  • Sprayhood: Yes (beige)
  • Bimini: Yes (beige)

Accommodation:

  • Double cabins: 3
  • Bathrooms: 2 (1 electric, 1 manual)
  • Interior wood: Light mahogany
  • Upholstery: Removable
  • Galley:
    • Stove: 3 burners
    • Oven: Yes
    • Fridge: Yes
    • Microwave: Bosch

Mechanical & Propulsion:

  • Engine: 1 x Volvo Penta D2-55F, 55 hp
  • Year: 2014
  • Engine hours: 1724
  • Fuel tank: 160 L
  • Transmission: S-drive (replaced in 2021)
  • Propeller: 3 fixed blades
  • Steering: Wheel
  • Bow thruster: Yes
  • Note: Bushings replaced in 2021

Navigation & Electronics:

  • Autopilot: Yes
  • VHF: Yes
  • Depth sounder: Yes
  • Log: Yes
  • Tridata: Yes
  • Compass: Yes
  • Stereo: Fusion
  • Plotter: Yes
  • Wind instrument: Yes
  • Note: Garmin GMI20 instrumentation, AIS Garmin, EPIRB

Electrical & Water Systems:

  • Voltage: 12/220V
  • Batteries: 1 + 4 Varta
  • Total amperage: 480 Ah
  • Water tanks: 2 (total 380 L, plastic)
  • Bilge pumps: 2 (1 electric, 1 manual)
  • Heating: Webasto
  • Battery charger: Cristeky
  • Boiler: 25 L
  • Pressurised water system: Yes
  • Black water tank: Yes
  • External shower: Yes
  • Note: Solar panels with Victron controller, inverter

Rigging & Sails:

  • Mast: Selden anodised aluminium
  • Winches: 4 (Lewmar)
  • Lazy bag: Yes
  • Vang: Selden
  • Backstay: Yes
  • Furling headsail: Furlex 304 S
  • Sails: Mainsail, headsail, and Code 0 (added in 2021)

Anchoring & Safety Equipment:

  • Windlass: Quick 1000W electric
  • Anchor: Delta
  • Chain: 70 m
  • Life raft: Yes
  • Fenders: 8

Whether for family holidays, passage making, or living aboard, the Bavaria 41C for sale 2014 offers a solid and comfortable sailing platform in good condition. For those seeking a reliable yacht and well-thought-out specifications, she is ready for her new journey. Contact us today for more details or to book your visit.
